concerns.detail: Contains profanity ('草') and makes an unsupported personal attack regarding financial disputes rather than addressing advising practices
concerns.excerpt: (草，原来耿哥拿我们的钱给你付房租去了，他还欠我5000刀)

concerns.detail: Personal insult suggesting the critic needs parents, which is a pure ad hominem attack unrelated to academic advising
Dismissive personal attack calling the critic a 'troll' (乐子) rather than addressing the substantive observation about PhD admissions
